decisions.description: Wrap the authorize call in PaymentProviderService with a 12-second timeout ceiling and return requires_more status when the timeout is exceeded, reusing the existing cart completion retry flow.
Add a background sweeper job via JobSchedulerService that finds payment sessions stuck in pending state for more than 5 minutes and voids them using the cancel method on AbstractPaymentProcessor.
Validate the response from payment provider authorize calls and throw a typed error when a community provider returns undefined or a malformed response object.
Emit a payment.authorization_timeout event through EventBusService whenever an authorize call exceeds the timeout ceiling, so monitoring can hook into it.

action_items.text: Implement the 12-second authorize timeout wrapper in PaymentProviderService
Implement the stale-payment-session sweeper job on JobSchedulerService
Emit the payment.authorization_timeout event through EventBusService
Add the provider-response guard/validation in PaymentProviderService
Set up the authorization-timeout dashboard and alert when the rate crosses 1%
